title: juniperus × fassettii
intro: Juniperus × fassettii, also known as Fassett's juniper, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Juniperus horizontalis and Juniperus monosperma. The medicinal properties of Juniperus × fassettii include its antiseptic, antispasmodic, and diuretic properties, which make it useful in treating urinary tract infections and other conditions. The health benefits of Juniperus × fassettii include its ability to reduce inflammation, relieve digestive issues, and support immune function. Juniperus × fassettii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which are commonly used in herbal medicine to harness its medicinal properties.
